steps.title: Use the innovation clues
steps.content: The examples show science fiction inspiring aerospace engineering and sparking smartphone design. The sentence after the blank says these narratives have spurred actual innovations. The blank needs a phrase meaning an active driver of technological advancement.

steps.title: Reject opposite roles
steps.content: Choice A means a distraction from advancement. Choice C means a limit on advancement. Choice D suggests financial backing rather than creative inspiration. The word for something that triggers or accelerates a process matches the examples. The answer is B.
